message:
feat: enforce coordinator tool restrictions for root session in benchmarks

The coordinator.md declares tools: [glob, grep, read_file, shell,
spawn_agent, resume_agent, task_list] but this was only enforced for
subagents via RestrictKeepingResultTool. The root session had access
to write_file, apply_patch, and exec_command, allowing the coordinator
to do implementation itself instead of delegating.

Now applies the same restriction in non-interactive (benchmark) mode.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
